horoscope: Today's Moon can inspire you to change your settings in some way, dear Aries, or it can help you see your life a little differently, and it can be refreshing. You may want to break free from the past, such as attachments to things that can no longer be a part of your life, or it's a time to seek personal opportunities, particularly related to healing, mental health, emotional wellness, financial support, home, property, and family. It can be a time of emotional pleasure and acceptance. Improvements in your domestic life lead you to feel more confident, in general.

One side of you is chatty, the other pensive and observant early today, dear Taurus. This shouldn't pose too much of a problem as long as you find ways to satisfy both needs. The Moon spends the day in your intimacy sector, and you gravitate to experiences and activities that help you better understand your inner workings and the motivations of people around you. Still, this can be a wonderful week for involvement with friends, groups, or teams. Circumstances are such that you’re feeling more hopeful, positive, and optimistic. Your perspective can change completely, in a very positive way, through a friend or further information that comes your way.

Today's Moon inclines you to seek companionship or feedback from someone special, dear Gemini. This may not be intuitive at first, as part of you is more focused on your personal or professional goals, and freeing up time for other things may seem like you're stepping backward. However, giving some due attention to those who support you and who are dear to your heart today can be rewarding. Energies are also good for increased confidence in your practical affairs. Your sense of self-worth is strong, and your long-term goals, especially professional or financial ones, are more satisfying. It's a great time to feel more positive about your value to others and about your talents. Look for distinct opportunities to improve your work, financial state, and reputation at this time.

The Moon spends the day in your sector of work, routines, and health, dear Cancer, and taking care of business and attending to the details of your life are stronger drives. Transits today also boost your enthusiasm and sense of creative enterprise. There is a fresh quality to your work and to your personality now. You are exploring new ideas and approaches, learning exciting things, and letting go of the more rigid elements of your life. It’s a time for gathering inspiration or for breakthroughs in your thinking.

Today's Moon reminds you to have some fun, entertain and be entertained, dear Leo, and perhaps get romantic or creative. You need that extra spark now. Fortunately, transits today can point to breakthroughs on a psychological or intimate level. Helping and supporting others can also build your confidence. You're letting in the positive energy now, which makes room for new opportunities. Ideas about debts, support, or dependencies can be particularly unique and useful today. You're feeling especially enthusiastic and optimistic, and others enjoy your conversation and look to you as a special confidant.

Today's Moon encourages you to slow down and get some extra time for quiet and comfortable activities, dear Virgo. Nevertheless, social matters are in good shape, and making time for others can be rewarding. You might discover very effective channels for your creativity. If you throw your energy into something that truly pleases you now, you're likely to feel stronger and happier for it. You're seeking intellectual companionship, or you may be working with someone toward shared long-term goals. It can be a time to let go of preconceived ideas about what friendships and relationships “should” be. A spirit of friendship and acceptance may be with you.

Work or duties and personal interests can both compete for your attention today, dear Libra. Doing it all may be possible, but not without a lot of stress, so aim for a balance! Fortunately, as the day advances, you can get a sense that you're more in charge of your happiness, and of course, this is the case. It’s a strong time for practical matters, business, and recognition for hard work and skills. Ideas for improving your reputation, sense of being in charge, or your routines can be golden now. You’re rethinking your goals, and new ideas are likely to emerge as you gain inspiration. You could enjoy more cooperation or support for your goals.

It's a time of the lunar month for enjoying what you have and looking for ways to boost your feelings of security and comfort, dear Scorpio. However, you might decide to step out of the routine just a little to keep things fresh. This can be a time of a love opportunity, or a chance meeting that inspires you. You’re in great shape for connecting with others romantically or creatively. Publishing, education, or a trip can be a positive and motivating focal point. A shift in your thinking patterns may have the effect of broadening your life experiences. Different ideas and beliefs can be inspiring now.

A spirit of innovation and moving forward is with you now, dear Sagittarius. You're in good shape with property, support from family, or a strong intimate connection that inspires and motivates you. You can become more aware of personal matters, the past, past conditioning, intimacy, or family matters, and a new understanding can give you a powerful feeling of moving forward. Letting go of old family conditioning or unhealthy ties to the past are themes. You could be successful with real estate ventures, property investments, entertaining at home, and rearranging things. Living conditions improve. You're emotionally ready to make lifestyle improvements. The Moon spends all day in your sign, and you can be clearer about how you feel. It's your reasonable expectations that help you achieve what you set out to do now.

You tend to take your time with your feelings today, dear Capricorn, and keep to yourself a little. This is part of a natural Moon cycle, even if it clashes with a theme in your life that encourages you to connect, share, and collaborate. Processing recent experiences is essential, however, and can help you bring your best self to your social life and projects, so be sure to take the time to find your center. Other influences today are strong for friendship, partnership, projects, and communications, in fact. You can be working on putting an end to limiting attitudes, problems, or situations that have been holding you back from expressing yourself freely. It’s a time to focus on self-improvement and take steps towards a much-improved lifestyle. Others enjoy your ideas and insights. You can be especially inventive, picking up information that others overlook.

The Moon spends the day in your social sector, dear Aquarius, and you want to diversify or spend more time on happy, fulfilling activities. You're also in good shape with income, finances, work, health, career, and daily routines. You could be feeling especially happy with what you’re doing, your work, or how you deal with your daily affairs. It can be a time to find different ways to manage health problems or to create a happier work environment. You’re bringing fresh, original ideas into your daily routines, and it can be a time of innovation in practical affairs, including money and work. As you enjoy yourself just a little more than before, productivity improves.

Today's energies are grounding and practical, dear Pisces, while managing to remain friendly and positive. Shared activities can be especially productive. You're gaining a renewed focus, a sense of adventure, commitment, and vitality this week, and it's invigorating. Advances can happen in love and in matters that draw on your stores of personal courage and creativity. A special hobby or channels of entertainment can be in the offing. A spirit of optimism helps bring new opportunities into your life. Today’s energies are powerful for breaking through negative attitudes and inhibitions. You are especially spirited and happy to take action if you know it’s going to improve your life.
